home.seoTitle: Kyuna (霜花) — freelance dev, OSS, cosplayer, AI tooling
home.seoDescription: Kyuna: freelance web dev (React/Next.js/Go), cosplay commissions, OSS consulting, AI creative tooling. Available for hire — kyuna-web.vercel.app.
home.imageAlt: Kyuna — engineer, OSS, AI comics, creator
home.buildSectionAria: How I group my work: product, backend, systems, creative
home.buildTree:
./build
├── product/      # TS/JS apps → kyuna-web.vercel.app · amane312.vercel.app
├── backend/      # Go services, APIs, automation, dotfiles
├── systems/      # Rust/C — OS-adjacent toys, bootloaders, engines
├── creative/     # editors, AI comic tooling, idea → panel faster
└── hire/         # freelance · commissions · consulting
home.bio: Hi—I'm Kyuna (霜花), based in Ulaanbaatar 🇲🇳 I ship product code, OSS, and AI comic pipelines; you’ll also find me on YouTube @amarihana and in cosplay communities when I’m not in the terminal~ ✨

timeline.2000: Born in Ulaanbaatar, Mongolia 🇲🇳 - The beginning of my adventure!
timeline.2019: Started my developer journey at Able Soft - First steps into the coding world! ✨
timeline.2021: Graduated from MUST & joined Sod Mongol LLC - Growing stronger every day! 💪
timeline.2023-01: Completed my journey at Sod Mongol LLC - Time for new adventures!
timeline.2023-02: Currently creating magic at Next Social Platform LLC 🌟
